title: astragalus pedunculosus
intro: Astragalus pedunculosus, also known as Mongolian milkvetch, is a perennial legume plant native to China and Mongolia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have numerous health benefits, including boosting the immune system, reducing stress and fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus pedunculosus can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
